Site History

Update Logs

July 20, 2026

Three units added

Added Ennard, Security Puppet, and Candy Cadet. Their starting values and demand are marked as estimates until official trading data is available.

July 20, 2026

Mutation multipliers adjusted

Automatic mutation values now use Shiny 2×, Diamond 3×, Amethyst 4.5×, and Ruby 6×.

July 20, 2026

Rarity categories added

The Database now separates units into APEX, Nightmare, and Secret sections with visible/total counts.

July 20, 2026

Chef Freddy added

Added Chef Freddy as a Nightmare Fire unit obtained from Crafting Chef Present, with 9/10 demand and a provisional estimated value.

July 20, 2026

Automatic mutation values

Mutation values now automatically estimate from the base value using Shiny 2×, Diamond 4×, Amethyst 8×, and Ruby 15× multipliers.

July 20, 2026

Music Man added

Added Music Man as a Secret Light unit with 1,500 FireSkulls value, 10/10 demand, 0 known exists, and Game 6 Wave 100 milestone obtainment.

July 20, 2026

Tactical Crashbot image fixed

Swapped Tactical Crashbot's images so the yellow robot is the main unit icon and the nuclear crate is shown as its obtainment present.

July 20, 2026

Three units added

Added Chica's Magic Rainbow, Tactical Crashbot, and Easter Bonnie with their supplied values, demand, rarity, known exists, and obtainment information.

July 20, 2026

First APEX unit

Chica's Magic Rainbow is now the first APEX unit and appears before Nightmare and Secret units in the database.

July 20, 2026

Rarity order and Towers module elements

Units now sort by APEX, Nightmare, then Secret. Existing and newly added unit elements were matched to the supplied Roblox Towers module.

July 20, 2026

Four more units added

Added Withered Foxy, Mangle, Freddy Frostbear, and Ignited Freddy with their requested values, demand, exists counts, obtainment details, and rarity styling.

July 20, 2026

Four units added

Added Withered Golden Freddy, Shadow Freddy, Withered Freddy, and Phantom Bonnie with their values, demand, rarity, obtainment, and known existence counts.

July 20, 2026

Yendo added

Added Yendo as a Secret unit with 5,500 FireSkulls value, 0 known exists, and Game 5 Wave 100 milestone obtainment.

July 20, 2026

Boss Raids Present icon added

Flamethrower Endo now shows the Boss Raids Present icon and its 0.05% obtainment chance in Unit Information.
